name: Chiggi Stats
description: Detailed playback statistics and reporting for Jellyfin. Tracks what every user is watching, how long they watch, and provides a filterable dashboard accessible directly inside Jellyfin. Supports filtering by user, date range, and media type. Data is stored in a local SQLite database with configurable retention.
overview: Detailed playback statistics with user/date/media filters.

versions.changelog: Fix: exclude Windows native e_sqlite3.dll from plugin root — Jellyfin's plugin scanner tried to load it as a managed assembly causing BadImageFormatException on startup. Only Linux/macOS native libs are now flattened to the plugin directory.

Feat: full reporting dashboard with Overview, Playback, Movies, Series, Seasons, Episodes, Music, Box Sets, Users, and Devices tabs. Admin-only inventory reports backed by live Jellyfin library data. Paginated playback history with date/user/media-type filters. Pure CSS bar chart — no external CDN dependencies.
Fix: SQLite native library now found correctly in Jellyfin plugin context (no more Malfunctioned). Fix: database initialisation split into separate statements to prevent startup crash.
Initial release. Playback tracking with SQLite storage, activity log integration, and in-Jellyfin stats dashboard.

name: Trakt
description: Sync your Jellyfin library to trakt.tv and scrobble your watch status. This is a fixed fork of the official Jellyfin Trakt plugin addressing 409 Conflict errors, rate-limit handling, duplicate watch history entries, TV show scrobbling failures in Jellyfin 10.11, and more.
overview: Sync library and scrobble to trakt.tv — fixed fork with bug fixes.

versions.changelog: Fix: restored Trakt settings/configuration page button (missing RootNamespace caused embedded resource path mismatch).
Fork of official v27 with fixes: #265 rate-limit HasFlag bug, #266 409 Conflict crash, #226 duplicate history (HashSet dedup), #258 null Series on TV scrobble.
